checks.name: BOARDROOM S1 narrative renders
checks.detail: 5 narrative paragraphs (OPENING, REVELATION, DEPTH, AUTHORITY, QUALIFICATION) render as editorial prose in CENTER panel

checks.name: Three-panel selection propagates
checks.detail: Clicking narrative section in CENTER updates LEFT (evidence context) and RIGHT (selected section context). selectedNarrativeArc state propagates through IntelligenceField → all three panels

checks.name: LEFT panel evidence context
checks.detail: Selected section shows evidence anchors (anchor_id, surprise_class, structural_basis), referenced evidence objects, source artifacts (phase, path, class), and authority envelope

checks.name: LEFT panel prompt state
checks.detail: No section selected: shows SELECT A SECTION prompt with aggregate stats (sections, anchors, evidence objects)

checks.name: RIGHT panel S1 blocks
checks.detail: Qualification (S1, Gate Pending), Structural Substrate (clusters, files, edges, inheritance), Composition (method, contract, replay tier)

checks.name: Arc claim chips visible
checks.detail: PROFILE (#4a9eff), DISCOVERY (#64ffda), COUPLING (#ffd700), AUTHORITY (#ff9e4a), GATE (#7a8aaa) chips render on narrative sections

checks.name: Provenance footer present
checks.detail: Shows DETERMINISTIC_BOUNDED, 75.x, anchor count, evidence object count

checks.name: DENSE mode unchanged
checks.detail: Visual regression check — no changes to DENSE rendering

checks.name: BALANCED mode unchanged
checks.detail: Visual regression check — no changes to BALANCED rendering

checks.name: Density/boardroom toggle mutual exclusion
checks.detail: Clicking density radio clears boardroomMode — modes are mutually exclusive

checks.name: S1 SVG suppressed
checks.detail: No SVG topology rendered at S1 qualification level

checks.name: S1 triadic roles suppressed
checks.detail: No ORIGIN/PASS_THROUGH/RECEIVER evidence blocks at S1

checks.name: Hero moments dissolved into narrative
checks.detail: No hero moment cards, chips, or dashboard elements — anchors orbit in LEFT panel, not inline

checks.name: Evidence object serialization safe
checks.detail: All undefined fields null-coalesced for Next.js JSON serialization

checks.name: S2+ cockpit preserved
checks.detail: BoardroomDecisionSurface branches on isS1 — S2+ path unchanged

checks.name: Composition interface supports future providers
checks.detail: composeGoverningNarrative accepts interchangeable providers; deterministicBoundedProvider is bootstrap, not hardwired

checks.name: Narrative anchors sorted by significance
checks.detail: CENTRALITY > TOPOLOGY > COUPLING > EMERGENCE priority order enforced
